_comment: SO-100/SO-101 eval results for allenai/MolmoAct2-SO100_101 (MolmoAct2). The results block is marked pending — no in-tree reproduction has been run yet. Paper-cited numbers are NOT transcribed here because the MolmoAct2 paper (arXiv:2605.02881) does not publish a separate SO-100/101 headline success rate distinct from LIBERO. Update this file once a local rollout is run with the reproduction_cli command below.

source.paper: MolmoAct2: Action Reasoning Models for Real-world Deployment
source.evaluated_by: pending — no local reproduction run yet
source.reproduction_planned: Requires a CUDA host with the so101_box MuJoCo scene and the NF4 weights pack.

reproduction_cli.description: Re-run this benchmark inside the OpenRAL repo. ADR-0009 PR D: openral benchmark run is the canonical producer of RSkillEvalResult JSONs with reproduced_locally=true.
reproduction_cli.status: pending — so101_tabletop benchmark suite not yet registered in tree
notes: SimEnvironment config MUST set vla.extra.norm_tag='so100_so101_molmoact2' — the molmoact2 adapter defaults to 'libero' which would apply wrong normalization.
Use the so101_box scene with cameras oak_top + wrist; the rSkill aliases map oak_top→top and wrist→side.
MolmoAct2 uses flow-matching inference (10 steps per action chunk); confirm enable_depth_reasoning=False matches paper eval protocol.
Weights are Apache-2.0 — no non-commercial gate.
Re-running and overwriting this file with the benchmark output flips reproduced_locally to true.

benchmark.name: SO-101 tabletop manipulation
benchmark.protocol: binary success on tabletop pick/place/manipulation tasks with the SO-101 follower arm

results.note: No locally-reproduced benchmark numbers yet. See reproduction_cli above to populate.
